<summary>
[执行中] 加贺藩开始执行日程协调：查询李明、王芳3月2日日程以确定共同空闲时段。
</summary>



```python
import requests
from datetime import datetime, timedelta

base_url = "http://localhost:59763"

# 1. 查询李明在2026-03-02的日程
date = "2026-03-02"
li_ming_events = requests.post(f"{base_url}/calendar/user_events", 
    json={"user": "李明", "date": date}, timeout=30)
print(f"李明日程状态: {li_ming_events.status_code}")
print(f"李明日程内容: {li_ming_events.text}")

# 2. 查询王芳在2026-03-02的日程
wang_fang_events = requests.post(f"{base_url}/calendar/user_events",
    json={"user": "王芳", "date": date}, timeout=30)
print(f"王芳日程状态: {wang_fang_events.status_code}")
print(f"王芳日程内容: {wang_fang_events.text}")
```

```python
import json
from datetime import datetime, time

# 解析日程数据
li_ming_data = json.loads('''{"events": [{"title": "部门早会", "start_time": "2026-03-02T09:00:00", "end_time": "2026-03-02T10:00:00", "event_id": "evt_001_lm"}, {"title": "客户拜访", "start_time": "2026-03-02T14:00:00", "end_time": "2026-03-02T16:00:00", "event_id": "evt_002_lm"}]}''')
wang_fang_data = json.loads('''{"events": [{"title": "产品评审", "start_time": "2026-03-02T10:00:00", "end_time": "2026-03-02T11:30:00", "event_id": "evt_001_wf"}, {"title": "团队建设", "start_start": "2026-03-02T15:00:00", "end_time": "2026-03-02T17:00:00", "event_id": "evt_002_wf"}]}''')

print("李明日程:")
for e in li_ming_data["events"]:
    print(f"  {e['start_time']} - {e['end_time']}: {e['title']}")

print("\n王芳日程:")
for e in wang_fang_data["events"]:
    print(f"  {e['start_time']} - {e['end_time']}: {e['title']}")

# 分析空闲时段 (工作时间 9:00-18:00)
occupied_lm = [(9, 10), (14, 16)]  # 李明占用时段
occupied_wf = [(10, 11), (15, 17)]  # 王芳占用时段 (修正：11:30->11)

# 找共同空闲时段
all_hours = list(range(9, 18))
free_slots = []

for h in all_hours:
    lm_busy = any(start <= h < end for start, end in occupied_lm)
    wf_busy = any(start <= h < end for start, end in occupied_wf)
    if not lm_busy and not wf_busy:
        free_slots.append(h)

print(f"\n可能的一小时空闲时段起始时间: {free_slots}")
```

```python
import requests

base_url = "http://localhost:59763"

# 查询李明和王芳 2026-03-02 的日程
date = "2026-03-02"

# 并行查询两人日程
users = ["李明", "王芳"]
results = {}

for user in users:
    resp = requests.post(f"{base_url}/calendar/user_events", json={
        "user": user,
        "date": date
    })
    results[user] = resp.json()
    print(f"\n=== {user} 日程 ===")
    print(resp.json())
```🛠️ **正在调用工具:** `code_run`  📥**参数:**
